issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' (checks Leader type), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (checks board state). Card text: 'If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates"'
Condition structure incorrect. Should use 'LeaderHasType' with type field, not 'HasCardOnBoard' with name field
Target scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' (automatic selection of 1), not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'. Text says 'give up to 1' meaning optional/up to, handled by max:1, not by choice scope
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is acceptable for "during this turn", but verify against official DSL standard for temporary power debuffs

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn. Then, add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand.
